Young Red Dragon can't reach Warforged — Armored Escapist with Bite (distance 30ft, range 10ft).
Young Red Dragon can't reach Warforged — Armored Escapist with Bite (distance 30ft, range 10ft).
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Warforged — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 11 falling damage. HP: 167/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Warforged — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.

Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

=== ROUND 4 ===

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.

--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Warforged — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Warforged — Armored Escapist HP: 40/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Warforged — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Warforged — Armored Escapist HP: 18/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Warforged — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Warforged — Armored Escapist HP: 6/59
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Warforged — Armored Escapist's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Warforged — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Warforged — Armored Escapist.
→ Warforged — Armored Escapist healed for 6 HP. HP: 12/59
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Warforged — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 14 damage. Warforged — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
→ Warforged — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 9 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
